Numerous trees down in the Green Lane and Tylersport area. Hardest hit area was at the intersection of Whites Mill Road and Swamp Creek Road in Green Lane. Several fires resulted from downed wires and transformers. Many road closures and power outages. Time estimated from radar.
Image from social media of trees down on wires on Skunk Hollow Road.
